languages.text: Инквизитор ван Калокс стал личной немезидой падшего генетора, преследуя его на протяжении нескольких десятилетий. Движение ксенаритов было объявлено еретическим во всем Просторе, и служители Инквизиции не жалели на его искоренение ни людей, ни прометия. Когда карательный отряд, ведомый лично инквизитором, наконец проник на планету, где бывший манипулус творил свои нечестивые изыскания, их встретил лишь огромный, идеально круглый кратер на месте его лаборатории. И сам Эоганн, и все гнусные механизмы, порожденные им, исчезли бесследно.

Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

languages.text: カルックス大審問官は、失脚したジェネトルの宿敵となり、数十年もの間彼を追跡した。異教徒の動きは、広大な宇宙全体で異端と宣言され、大審問院は、その根絶に尽力し、その下僕やプロメシウムを問わず容赦しなかった。大審問官自ら率いる懲罰隊が、かつてのマニピュラスが不浄な研究を行っていた惑星にやっと侵入した時、彼らが発見したのは、彼の研究所跡に広がる、完璧な円形の巨大なクレーターだった。エオグン自身と彼が作り出した汚れた機械は、跡形もなく消えていた。
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

languages.text: 审判官冯·卡洛克斯成了这位堕落基因士的宿敌，在数十年的时间里无情地追捕着他。异形科技派在整个扩区被宣布为异端，审判庭不惜人力和钷素，也誓要将其根除。某日，审判官亲率惩戒小队，终于攻入了那位前操纵者进行亵渎研究的行星。可他们只在实验室的旧址上，找到了一个巨大、完美的圆形深坑。至于伊奥贡本人及其制造的所有邪恶机械，均已消失得无影无踪。
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

languages.text: L'inquisiteur van Calox devint l'ennemi juré du genetor tombé en disgrâce, qu'il pourchassa sans relâche plusieurs décennies durant. Le mouvement des xénarites fut déclaré hérétique dans toutes les Étendues et l'Inquisition n'épargna ni serviteurs ni prométhium pour tenter de l'éradiquer. Lorsque l'escouade punitive menée par l'inquisiteur débarqua finalement sur la planète où l'ex-manipulus menait ses recherches impies, elle ne trouva qu'un vaste cratère parfaitement rond sur le site de son laboratoire. Eogunn lui-même et tous les ignobles mécanismes de sa création avaient disparu sans laisser de trace.
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

traits.locale_text: L'inquisiteur van Calox devint l'ennemi juré du genetor tombé en disgrâce, qu'il pourchassa sans relâche plusieurs décennies durant. Le mouvement des xénarites fut déclaré hérétique dans toutes les Étendues et l'Inquisition n'épargna ni serviteurs ni prométhium pour tenter de l'éradiquer. Lorsque l'escouade punitive menée par l'inquisiteur débarqua finalement sur la planète où l'ex-manipulus menait ses recherches impies, elle ne trouva qu'un vaste cratère parfaitement rond sur le site de son laboratoire. Eogunn lui-même et tous les ignobles mécanismes de sa création avaient disparu sans laisser de trace.

languages.text: El Inquisidor van Calox se convirtió en la némesis personal del genetor caído en desgracia y lo persiguió durante varias décadas. El movimiento xenarita se declaró herejía en toda la Extensión, y la Inquisición dedicó grandes cantidades de sirvientes y prometio para su erradicación. Cuando el escuadrón de castigo liderado por el propio Inquisidor llegó al planeta en el que el antiguo manipulus realizaba sus pérfidas investigaciones, tan solo encontró un cráter gigantesco y perfectamente redondo donde había estado su laboratorio. Eogunn, junto con todos los mecanismos impíos que había producido, se había desvanecido sin dejar rastro.
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

languages.text: Sorgucu van Calox, itibarını yitirmiş Genetör'ü şahsi bir düşman gibi görüp onlarca yıl boyunca onu acımasızca takip etti. Zenarit hareketi, tüm Enginlik'te kâfirlik ilan edildi. Engizisyon, hareketi yok etme çabalarında ne hizmetkârlarını ne de prometyumunu esirgedi. Bizzat Sorgucu tarafından yönetilen ceza infaz mangası nihayet eski Manipülus'un kutsal olmayan araştırmalarını yürüttüğü gezegene nüfuz ettiğinde buldukları tek şey, laboratuvarının yerinde bulunan devasa, kusursuz derecede yuvarlak bir kraterdi. Eogunn'un kendisi ve ürettiği tüm iğrenç mekanizmalar, iz bırakmadan ortadan kaybolmuştu.
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades. The xenarite movement was declared heretical throughout the entire Expanse, and the Inquisition spared neither servants nor promethium in its efforts to eradicate it. When the punitive squad led by the Inquisitor himself finally penetrated the planet where the former Manipulus had been conducting his unholy research, all they found was a vast, perfectly round crater on the site of his laboratory. Eogunn himself and all the foul mechanisms he had produced had vanished without a trace.

Eogunn'un kendisi ve ürettiği tüm iğrenç mekanizmalar, iz bırakmadan ortadan kaybolmuştu.

languages.text: Inquisitor van Calox wurde der persönliche Erzfeind des in Ungnade gefallenen Genetors, den er mehrere Dekaden lang unermüdlich jagte. Die Xenariten-Bewegung wurde in der gesamten Ausdehnung für ketzerisch erklärt, und die Inquisition sparte werden an Dienern, noch an Promethium, um sie auszulöschen. Als der vom Inquisitor selbst angeführte Straftrupp schließlich auf dem Planeten landete, auf dem der einstige Manipulus seine unheilige Forschung vorangetrieben hatte, fand er anstelle seines Labors nur einen riesigen, kreisrunden Krater. Eogunn war ebenso wie all die unheiligen Mechanismen, die er geschaffen hatte, spurlos verschwunden.
languages.original_text: Inquisitor van Calox became the personal nemesis of the disgraced Genetor, relentlessly pursuing him for several decades.
